p.font: Welcome to the Odoo Agricultural Store package.

template.p: This solution is designed to manage every aspect of agricultural retail, supporting both B2B and B2C sales of farming products. It covers Point of Sale (POS) and website operations, offering organized categories like seeds, pesticides, nutrition, and equipment.
It integrates essential Odoo modules, including POS, Sales & Purchase. Utilizing the Website and E-commerce applications is key to accelerating growth in this sector.

a.class: o_no_link_popover py-1 pe-1 d-block text-reset o_embedded_toc_link o_embedded_toc_link_depth_0
o_no_link_popover py-1 pe-1 d-block text-reset o_embedded_toc_link o_embedded_toc_link_depth_0
o_no_link_popover py-1 pe-1 d-block text-reset o_embedded_toc_link o_embedded_toc_link_depth_0

template.p: You can access every installed App in your Odoo database on your main dashboard.

ul.li: Point of Sale App: Manage in-store transactions efficiently, handling sales of seeds, tools, and supplies with ease.
Sales App: Handle B2B orders and contracts for large farming clients, ensuring accurate pricing.
Purchase App: Streamline the procurement of farming products from suppliers, managing costs and lead times.
eCommerce App: Expand your reach by selling products online, offering convenience to modern farmers.

li.font: Build a professional online presence to showcase your catalog and attract new customers.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false

div.p: Odoo is entirely integrated into an App. Download it to manage your entire business from your phone.

template.p: By uploading this module's demo data, your database has been filled with a few contacts.
To get a rapid understanding of the processes this Odoo package offers, you can execute the following flows and configure the settings to suit your Agricultural Store.
Of course, this is just an overview of the features included in this package. Feel free to add new apps, delete/modify demo data, and test everything around!

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-warning pb-0 pt-3

div.p: You didn't import demo data? You can still do it. Go to Apps > Industries > Upgrade your Agricultural Shop package and select the relevant checkbox

template.p: Odoo enables complete control over your product catalog and basic stock management, ensuring your inventory data is always accurate.
Start by creating your products within the Products tab, filling in all necessary details. The system uses three distinct categories to provide maximum flexibility across your business:

li.p: Product Category: For internal tracking and reporting.
E-commerce Category: For easier product retrieval by customers on your online store.
Point of Sale Category: For organizing transactions within your shop system.
Accurately update the inventoried quantity.
Decide whether to allow sales of out-of-stock products.
Define product variants for an improved e-commerce customer journey. Important: Only assign a single value per attribute to prevent the system from creating separate stock entities.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3

div.p: the current setup keeps things simple by using basic product counts to track stock. If you need more power, the Inventory app introduces advanced features like barcode scanning, location tracking, and serial number management.
Note: Increased capability leads to higher complexity and more maintenance.

Our Advice: Stick with your current streamlined configuration until you’re fully comfortable. When you're ready to upgrade, try the Inventory module on a duplicated database first to ensure it fits your workflow. 😉

template.p: Odoo’s Point of Sale (POS) system ensures fast and smooth transactions in your agriculturalshop. Whether you sell individual packaged seeds, or bulk pick & mix, Odoo has you covered.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3

div.p: Enable weight-based pricing for pick & mix candy by setting the unit of measure to grams or kilograms (Point of Sale > Three dot menu > IoT Box > Electronic Scale).

ul.li: To start an order in your Point of Sale (POS) session, scan or select all items. For products sold by weight (grams or kilograms), a window will pop up automatically. Enter the specific weight, and the final price will be calculated immediately.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3

div.p: For full automation, connect a scale to your POS system using an IoT Box.

li.p: Accept multiple payment options: cash, card, and mobile payments.
Generate printed or digital receipts for customers.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3

div.p: These tools allow you to manage your sales strategy and customer interactions effectively:

li.p: Pricelist Segmentation: Define multiple pricing structures for the same product, supporting different business models (e.g., B2B vs. B2C) and enabling client-specific pricing contracts.
Promotional Agility: Use discounts and promotions to quickly adjust pricing for sales events or to give targeted, manual reductions at the point of sale.
Loyalty Programs: Implement loyalty cards as a core strategy to activate customer retention and increase lifetime value.

template.p: Your e-commerce setup involves three main areas: Product Settings, Website-Wide Settings, and Payment & Delivery Methods.

li.p: Publishing: Each product can be publishe independently on your online store.
Product-Level Settings: Define core product settings directly on the product form.
Layout Settings: Adjust the visual presentation and layout of products using the website editor.
Navigate to Website Settings to configure global e-commerce policies.

Crucial Review: You must review all e-commerce settings to ensure they align with your internal business policies (e.g., when invoices are generated, whether a mandatory customer check-in is required for ordering, etc.).

template.p: Use the Website > Configuration menu to enable all your transaction options.

li.p: Payment Providers & Methods: Go to Website > Configuration > Payment Providers and install all the payment methods and providers you plan to offer (e.g., credit card processors, PayPal, etc.).
Delivery Methods: Go to Website > Configuration > Delivery Methods to define all available options and their costs.
External Providers: Check if a predefined Odoo connection exists if you work with specific shipping carriers.
In-Store Pickup (Click & Collect): If you wish to offer this, you must activate the setting within the Website Settings first.

template.h3: B2B Customer Configuration and Sales Workflow🤝
template.p: Use these settings to tailor the experience for your B2B clients:

li.p: Define B2B Pricing: Create and assign a dedicated pricelist to each B2B contact. Ensure this pricelist is active on your website so the customer sees their agreed-upon prices upon login.
Capture Requests: Any submission via the "Contact Us" page instantly generates a new CRM opportunity.
Qualify Leads: Engage with the client through the CRM opportunity to fully understand their request—whether it's a need for a specific product, a supplier inquiry, or general information.
Quote and Confirm: If a specific demand requires pricing, generate a quotation directly from the opportunity. The client can then confirm and sign it online.
Automatic Delivery: Once the quote is accepted, it's possible to deliver the products just as it does for a regular e-commerce order.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3

div.p: You have flexibility regarding when to generate invoices:

li.p: You can choose in the settings to invoice either before or after delivery.
You also have the option to require a down payment initially, with the remainder invoiced later.

template.p: You can easily tailor your website to provide the information you want for potential leads.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3

div.p:
Use the
SEO features to improve your website's online visibility and search rankings.

template.h1: Do You Want to Go Further?
template.p: Once your core operations are running smoothly, consider expanding your toolset:

li.p: Accounting: Automatically log payments, close sessions, and generate tax reports.

ul.li: Payroll: Use this feature to handle employee salaries and manage holiday requests.
Field Service: Implement this module if you offer on-site repair or maintenance services.

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false

div.p: Would you like to discuss your Odoo setup with us or go even further?
